# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: CodeGrind: AI Assistant meets Code Breach Tower Defense Sync
- Summary: Show how the AI assistant guides problem-solving while Code Breach towers visualize coding concepts, highlighting real-time interaction and problem-solving flow.
- Slug: codegrind-ai-assistant-and-tower-defense-sync
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

- Media source: generated
- Asset label: generated-codegrind-ai-assistant-and-tower-defense-sync
- Asset URL: https://rivie13.github.io/assets/images/codegrind-engagement/2026-06-16-codegrind-ai-assistant-and-tower-defense-sync.png
- Asset MIME: image/png
- Selection reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

## Brief

- Core message: Demonstrate the integration of Azure OpenAI-powered guidance with Code Grinds’ cyberpunk Code Breach tower defense—where programming concepts are visually represented as towers and the AI assistant helps users solve challenges in real time.
- CTA: Try a problem now with AI guidance and watch your towers adapt to the solution flow
- Visual brief: Dynamic 15–20s clip: split screen showing (left) AI chat panel guiding a LeetCode-style problem; (right) in-game view of Code Breach towers like ForLoop and IfCondition upgrading in response to AI prompts; include subtle cyberpunk aesthetics and UI chrome from CodeGrind.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
